MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

Parties emailed the court reporting they have reached a resolution to this discovery motion after the tentative ruling was posted. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS JENNIFER HOFMANN and ROBERT COONS' Motion To Compel Further Responses From Ruiyu Yu To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Admissions, Set One; And Request For Monetary Sanctions: is off calendar; motion withdrawn by moving party.
